case_title: CHERYL M. MCDERMOTT VS. IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDERMOTT, CHERYL M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ITS JUST LUNCH SAN FRANCISCO THE PARTIES AGREE TO DELETE IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC AS A DEFENDANT AND TO ADD THE CORRECTLY NAMED DEFENDANT, IJLSF. AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES NOTICE, SERVICE AND ALL IRREGULARITIES RELATING TO THE CHANGE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 SERVED SEP-21-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY MCDERMOTT, CHERYL M. AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-08-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHERYL M. MCDERMOTT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH'S REPRESENTATIVE MANDY WATSON. REQUEST TO CHANGE DEFENDANT FROM IT'S JUST LUNCH INTERNATIONAL, LLC TO IT'S JUST LUNCH, SAN FRANCISCO LLC - GRANTED. DEFENDANT WAIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS TO IJLSF, LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
